meta.title: Moonlight Sonata I - Yangqin + Ethereal Tongue Drum Mix
meta.author: Ludwig van Beethoven; TsukiSynth yangqin/tongue drum mix from Mutopia MIDI
meta.description: First movement of Piano Sonata No. 14 in C-sharp minor, Op. 27 No. 2, mixed with TsukiSynth cimbalom/yangqin as the main hammered layer and tongue_drum as a soft ethereal halo. Source MIDI: Mutopia Project, Stewart Holmes edition, Berners 1908 source, CC BY-SA 2.5.
